subcodes.first_line: O Forgiving Lord! The star of Thy compassion hath shone forth upon the world of creation, and the surging ocean of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بخشنده کوکب بخشایشت بر جهان آفرینش درخشیده و دریای احسانت مواج بر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @prayer for forgiveness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @love of God
